channel.title: FierceBiotech — Health, Longevity & Diet
channel.description: FierceBiotech articles filtered for longevity, health, diet, and healthspan research

item.title: Anthropic acquires stealth AI startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: reports
item.description: AI powerhouse Anthropic is continuing its push into the healthcare arena with the acquisition of previously stealth AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to reporting from The Information and Eric Newcomer.

item.title: US, UK regulators bolster medical device collaboration while lifting tariffs
item.description: The U.S. FDA and the U.K.’s Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency agreed to bolster their ongoing medical technology collaboration while also removing tariffs on British medicine exports.

item.title: White House floats 12.5% budget cut for HHS in FY2027, reiterates reorganization plan
item.description: The requested budget cut is about half of what the administration asked, and was denied, last year. However, plans for reorganizing agencies under an Administration for a Healthy America persist, as do calls to eliminate various programs and centers the White house ideologically opposes.

item.title: UK signs off on US pharma deal, ensuring tariff reprieve as Britain aims to reattract investments
item.description: The U.K.'s end of the deal requires it to spend more on drugs through its National Health Service, which it is implementing through a higher cost-effectiveness threshold for its National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE).

item.title: Premier Radiology acquires teleradiology specialist GLOBIS
item.description: Premier Radiology Services, which has been on an acquisition tear in the last year, snapped up fellow teleradiology specialist Global Imaging Solutions, which goes by GLOBIS, for an undisclosed amount.

item.title: Alzheimer's-focused Korsana to use Cyclerion reverse merger to go public
item.description: After emerging from stealth last month with $175 million in funding, Korsana Biosciences has wasted no time making its way to the public markets.
